speaker: SENATOR
text: Behold our patroness, the life of Rome!

speaker: SENATOR
text: Call all your tribes together, praise the gods,

speaker: SENATOR
text: And make triumphant fires. Strew flowers before them,

speaker: SENATOR
text: Unshout the noise that banished Martius,

speaker: SENATOR
text: Repeal him with the welcome of his mother.
